code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API    
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Validate request from Orch and create Auth session 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (Security_ZeroTrust)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (Security_IntrusionDetection)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (Security_Encryption)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (Security_IntrusionDetection)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (Security_Encryption)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个登录流程的时序图，核心是Orchestration层调用Authentication Frontend，然后走OAuth 2.0授权。
明白，Orchestration发起302重定向到/authorize。接下来Frontend是自己处理验证，还是要调内部API？
elements_involved: Validate request from Orch and create Auth session

cscw_dialogue.utterance: Frontend先自己验证请求并创建会话，然后调用Authentication Internal API的/start接口，这里要标注Security_ZeroTrust。
好的，已加上Frontend自调用验证，以及到Internal API的/start请求。Internal API返回StartResponse.java对象。
接下来Frontend的状态机要根据start响应决定流向，然后调用/user-exists检查用户是否存在，这个环节用Security_IntrusionDetection。
确认一下：状态机决策后，Frontend调Internal API查用户存在性，返回CheckUserExistsResponse.java，然后Frontend自己验证用户是否已有账号？
elements_involved: Validates that the user already has an account

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，验证完账号存在后，要走Account Interventions检查。这里Frontend调Internal API的/account-interventions，Internal API再调Account Interventions API，注意两层不同的安全标记。
已补充：Frontend→Internal API（Security_Encryption），Internal API→Account Interventions API（Security_IntrusionDetection），返回blocked=true的响应。
elements_involved: Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true

cscw_dialogue.utterance: Account Interventions返回blocked后，Internal API要生成审计事件，然后把AccountInterventions.java对象返回给Frontend，里面包含blocked干预信息。
elements_involved: Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 这里有个细节：Frontend收到blocked干预后，要阻止用户做密码重置，对吧？然后还要调/login接口？
elements_involved: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 是的，Frontend先阻止密码重置，但仍然要走/login流程，调Internal API的/login（Security_Encryption），拿到LoginResponse.java。
已加上/login请求和LoginResponse返回。最后Frontend展示Blocked干预页面，整个流程结束。
完整了。确认一下所有参与者：Orchestration、Authentication Frontend、Authentication External API、Authentication Internal API、Account Interventions API，关系和安全标记都正确。
